one_time_description: Carrier Sekani Tribal Council treaty negotiation loan forgiveness recognized as revenue
economic_notes: Nation has government business entities including Saik'uz Development Corporation, Saik'uz Yun K Ut, Tagi Resources Limited Partnership, Tin Toh Forest Products Ltd., Tin Toh Forest Products LLP, and 0944099 BC Ltd. Tin Toh Forest Products LLP reported revenues of $3,030,894 and a net loss of $395,050. COVID-19 pandemic declared March 11, 2020 with uncertain financial impact. Nation also has non-controlled investments in SCC Contracting Ltd. and Desti Holdings Ltd.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (not 2024). Large one-time item: $1,889,719 treaty negotiation loan forgiveness from Carrier Sekani Tribal Council recorded as revenue in Treaty segment. Six government business enterprises accounted for by modified equity method with combined loss of $583,241. Cash is negative (bank overdraft of $518,622). Ottawa Trust Fund of $994,236 held in Government of Canada consolidated revenue fund included as restricted cash. Treaty negotiation loan of $1,889,719 also forgiven on financing side. Significant Carrier Sekani Tribal Council receivable of $2,746,295. Contaminated building with undetermined remediation cost. Prior year (2019) audited by a different auditor. No remuneration schedule included in the financial statements. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $3,634,783 + CSTC $3,332,692 + CSFS $401,468 + PGNAETA $375,953 + Province of BC $69,291 + CMHC $17,073 + First Nations Health Authority $44,183 + Aboriginal Head Start $89,568 + New Relationship Trust $20,000 = $7,985,011 approximately; osr adjusted accordingly. Wages in segmented disclosure total $2,401,761 for 2020.
